endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/topologies
endpoints.description: Gets a list that allows to build a topology view of a subscription and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/topologies
endpoints.description: Gets a list that allows to build a topology view of a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/topologies/{topologyResourceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TOPOLOGYRESOURCENAME}} with a real topologyresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.
